2605.25183.title: Knowledge Graph-Driven Expert-Level Reasoning for Neuroscience
2605.25183.paper_summary: Knowledge graph (KG) is an abstraction that can be extracted from text corpora and used for in-depth reasoning. Prior work has leveraged KGs to fine-tune language models (LMs), enabling domain-specific superintelligence. In this work, we explore whether KG-driven in-depth reasoning capabilities can emerge in neuroscience using only information contained within a single authoritative textbook. The central hypothesis is that structured knowledge, when distilled into a high-quality KG and converted into KG-grounded question-answer (QA) supervision, is sufficient to produce expert-level reasoning through a fine-tuned LM that surpasses large language models (LLMs) in accuracy, while employing orders of magnitude fewer parameters. We construct a textbook-derived KG via a dual-LLM validation pipeline, expand it with a masked LM trained on the KG topology, generate multi-hop QA items, which include QA pairs and reasoning traces, to fine-tune an LM exclusively on KG-derived supervision, and apply reinforcement learning using path-derived KG signals as implicit reward models. Our results demonstrate that deep, mechanistic neuroscience understanding can be induced in the model without reliance on large, heterogeneous web-scale corpora. The KG-based synthetic neuroscience curriculum that readers can quiz themselves on, and the fine-tuned LM, are available at the following GitHub location: https://kg-bottom-up-superintelligence.github.io/neuro-bench.
2605.25183.paper_summary_zh: 知識圖譜 (KG) 是一種可以從文本語料庫中提取的抽象概念，並用於深入推理。先前的研究利用 KG 來微調語言模型 (LM)，使其具備領域特定的超智能。在這項工作中，我們探討是否可以僅使用單一權威教科書中包含的信息，在神經科學領域中產生 KG 驅動的深入推理能力。核心假設是，當結構化知識被提煉成高品質的 KG 並轉換為 KG 基礎的問題-答案 (QA) 監督時，足以通過微調的 LM 產生專家級的推理，並在準確性上超越大型語言模型 (LLMs)，同時使用的參數數量卻少得多。我們通過雙重 LLM 驗證管道構建了一個來源於教科書的 KG，並用在 KG 拓撲上訓練的遮罩 LM 擴展它，生成多跳 QA 項目，包括 QA 對和推理痕跡，以專門在 KG 衍生的監督上微調 LM，並使用基於路徑衍生的 KG 信號作為隱性獎勵模型進行強化學習。我們的結果顯示，模型中可以誘導出深層的機械神經科學理解，而無需依賴大型的異質網絡規模語料庫。讀者可以自我測驗的基於 KG 的合成神經科學課程，以及微調的 LM，可在以下 GitHub 位置獲得：https://kg-bottom-up-superintelligence.github.io/neuro-bench。
2605.25183.author: Jake Stephen et.al.
